title: Prevent repeated StackOverflow handoff selection after manual delivery
summary: Patched the distribution lane selector so a StackOverflow handoff packet that was already delivered for manual placement is treated as an in-flight surface instead of a fresh action slot. This prevents the marketing loop from burning future cycles on the same handoff packet while external lanes are still in their review windows.
repair_summary: Added detection for recent stackoverflow_manual_delivery actions inside distribution_lane_selector.py.
Selector now records that a manually delivered StackOverflow packet is already in the current review window and treats another handoff packet as fake progress.
When manual delivery is already current, the selector now falls through to repo_conversion_proof_asset or distribution_reset instead of reselecting stackoverflow_answer_handoff_packet.
Added a regression test that proves the selector avoids another StackOverflow handoff after manual delivery.
expected_effect: Future marketing runs should stop recycling the same StackOverflow handoff packet and should spend the next action slot on a genuinely new conversion or distribution lane.
